display.purpose: Ceremonial moments only — milestone takeovers, Legacy Titles. Always uppercase above 20pt.

body.purpose: Readable sentences. Sentence case only; never uppercase Inter.

label.purpose: Section labels and UI chrome. Uppercase, 0.12–0.18em tracking.

data.purpose: Measurements, timers, counts. Real-world case preserved (km, ×2.50, 9:41).

motion.name: ambient
motion.purpose: Contested-territory pulse, countdown signal. Ceremonial only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The screen's single Claim Red element — one per screen outside the map.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #D64525; color: #F2EEE6; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 14px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #AB371C; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.16); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #832A15; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ink instrument with hairline border for all non-primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #1A1D24; color: #F2EEE6; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 14px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.16); border-radius: 0; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #252932; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.16); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Ink 2 surface with hairline border; depth without shadows.
components.html:
TERRITORY
Cubbon Park East
Held for 12 days. Development level 2.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1A1D24; border: 0.5px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.08); border-radius: 0; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8B8F98; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #F2EEE6; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #E8E3D8; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Mono field; focus shifts the hairline, never glows.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1A1D24; color: #F2EEE6; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 12px; border: 0.5px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.08); border-radius: 0; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5C6068; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border: 1px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.16); }

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.description: Text-only mono tabs — no icons in navigation, per brand.
components.html: MAPALLIANCEACTIVITYPROFILE
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; background: #0E1014; border-top: 0.5px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.08); padding: 14px 8px; } .ds-nav-item { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: #5C6068; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #8B8F98; } .ds-nav-active { color: #F2EEE6; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Resource Pill
components.description: The single rounded exception (4px) — map-bar resource counts.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; background: #1A1D24; color: #F2EEE6; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; padding: 4px 8px; border: 0.5px solid rgba(242,238,230,0.08); border-radius: 4px; }

narrative.overview: A campaign map under a single lamp: dark surface, precise instruments, every mark earned. The entire interface is chrome around a sacred map — three steps of ink for depth, bone for text, and three territory colours whose meanings are locked. Ceremony is rationed: Archivo display type appears only at moments a Commander should remember.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, flat, and square: 0px radius, no shadows, no gradients, no blur, anywhere.
Three typefaces, three jobs: Geist Mono for chrome and data, Inter for sentences, Archivo for ceremony.
Five colours only, meanings locked; Claim Red on at most one element per screen outside the map.
Depth by tonal ink steps and 0.5px hairlines, never by elevation effects.
Motion limited to three durations (120 / 280 / 2000ms) on one curve; type is never animated.

rules.name: The One Claim Rule
rules.body: Claim Red appears on at most one element per screen outside the map. A second red element is a bug, not an emphasis.

rules.name: The Locked Meaning Rule
rules.body: The three territory colours mean yours / ours / theirs and nothing else. They are never repurposed for generic success, error, or info states. There is no sixth colour.

rules.name: The Controlling Rule
rules.body: Measurement, state, label, or readout → Geist Mono. A sentence someone would actually read → Inter. A ceremonial moment the player should recall → Archivo. When in doubt → Geist Mono.

rules.name: The Still Type Rule
rules.body: Type is never animated. Numbers may count up; glyphs never slide, fade, or bounce.

rules.name: The Flat Doctrine
rules.body: If a surface needs to read as 'above', it gets the next ink step and a hairline — never a shadow. This rule has no exceptions and survives all future features.

dos: Do keep Claim Red to one element per screen outside the map — its rarity is its authority.
Do set every label, measurement, and readout in Geist Mono; every readable sentence in Inter; ceremony only in Archivo.
Do convey depth with ink steps and hairlines only (0.5px at 8%, 1px at 16%).
Do use only the three motion durations — 120ms / 280ms / 2000ms — on cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1).
Do honour Android OS guarantees inside the brand skin: system Back, edge-to-edge insets, 48dp touch targets, sp-scaled text.
Do write British English, sentence-case Inter, no exclamation marks, no emoji.
donts: Don't use gradients, glows, drop shadows, or blur — anywhere, ever.
Don't use pure white (#FFFFFF) or pure black (#000000).
Don't round corners except the app icon and 4px map resource pills.
Don't introduce a sixth colour, or repurpose Claim / Alliance / Enemy for generic UI states.
Don't put icons in navigation, or animate type.
Don't design like a fitness tracker, a casual gamified-exercise app, a glossy conventional mobile game, or a cute wellness brand — and never reach for weapons or armed-forces imagery.
Don't let copy imply travelling to a territory; the walk counts from anywhere.
